title: Rich Silky American Mushrooms Casserole
description: A warm, comforting dish perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon featuring wild mushrooms and a creamy sauce. Serve in individual ramekins for a delightful presentation.

ingredients.name: mushrooms
ingredients.notes: wild mushrooms, such as chanterelle or oyster

instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Bring mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in Gruyère cheese until melted.
Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
Spoon mushroom mixture into individual ramekins and top with additional Gruyère cheese.
Bake until golden brown and bubbly, about 15-20 minutes.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
